danger_signals.visual_form: Hostile creatures from the dark side; demonic/supernatural entities

danger_signals.meaning: Organized opposition from the antagonist faction

safety_signals.visual_form: Japanese-themed weapons (katana, shurikens) and high-tech armaments displayed in environment
safety_signals.meaning: Player empowerment and readiness for combat

safety_signals.visual_form: 3D voxel-based usable items rendered in first-person view
Drivable tanks and armed vehicles in levels

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Minions and creatures under Zilla's control; summoned dark-side entities
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Futuristic Japan setting; corporate-controlled industrial environments

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Japanese cultural identity; martial tradition via katana and shuriken
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Japanese-themed weapon aesthetics; Eastern martial philosophy

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Demonic creatures manifesting in the physical world

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Futuristic Japan under corporate control; appearance of normalcy in corporate structures
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Lo Wang operates as a willing Zilla enforcer; minions patrol controlled territories

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Increased enemy presence; dark-side creatures manifest in industrial and urban areas
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Escalating hostility; creatures actively hunting Lo Wang; environmental corruption spreads

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Massive samurai war mech emerges; culmination of supernatural and technological fusion
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Boss encounter; Master Zilla pilots the mech in direct confrontation; attempted final kill

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Master Zilla defeated but escapes; unresolved conflict
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Zilla vows future confrontation; world state remains unstable

environmental_storytelling.example: Futuristic Japan setting communicates world dominance by Zilla Enterprises; corporate control visualized through industrial environments
Japanese-themed weapons (katana, shurikens) reinforce Lo Wang's cultural identity and martial tradition; high-tech weapons (railgun, Uzis) contrast with Eastern aesthetics
Mix of supernatural creatures and corporate minions visually communicates the alliance between dark deities and Zilla; creature design emphasizes otherworldly corruption
Puzzles and environmental obstacles tell story of Lo Wang's journey from corporate enforcer to rebel; navigation challenges mirror personal transformation
Master Zilla's samurai war mech visually manifests the fusion of supernatural power with industrial might; scale and design communicate peak threat level

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Accepts assignments; complicit in Zilla's expansion
Actively hunts enemies; pursues redemption through combat
Patrol territories; attack on sight; defend Zilla's interests
Hunt Lo Wang; visible signs of supernatural corruption; attack in coordination with corporate forces
Pilots war mech; attempts to eliminate Lo Wang; escapes when defeated

notes: Shadow Warrior uses visual and mechanical design to communicate political conflict between corporate corruption (Zilla Enterprises) and personal redemption (Lo Wang's rebellion). The game's Japanese cultural aesthetic conflicts with futuristic corporate imagery, creating visual tension that mirrors the narrative conflict. Weapon design (Japanese traditional + high-tech) and enemy variety (minions + supernatural creatures) reinforce the dual-threat nature of the antagonist force. The Build engine's room-over-room and voxel technology allowed for richer environmental storytelling. The game's tone combines action with 'tongue-in-cheek humor,' suggesting darker themes are presented with ironic distance.
